summary: Color graded video set to music with no speech. It shows ICE ERO 'POLICE' agents loading detainees onto a charter bus and an aircraft taxiing and taking off, with a light-streak motion-blur transition and neon-blue text overlays ('LEAVES ON YOUR OWN TERMS', 'DHS.GOV/CBPHOME'). It closes on an animated DHS seal.

script.scene: Backlit dusk shot from behind an agent whose vest reads 'POLICE / ERO' as detainees in vests board a charter bus on a tarmac; film-grain overlay.
Vertical light-streak motion-blur transition in blue, orange and green tones with floating particles.
A jet lifts off a runway at dusk; glowing overlay 'LEAVES ON YOUR OWN TERMS'; a water tower and tree line behind.
An unmarked white airliner taxis on the runway; large neon-blue overlay 'DHS.GOV/CBPHOME' across the frame.
Animated full-color U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal on a light background.

notable_text: Self-deport or be deported: the choice is yours.
